subcodes.title: Words spoken to Miss N. on 27 Jan 1910
subcodes.first_line: Ich könnte Dir, meine Schwester, mit den Worten unseres Herrn Jesu Christi -- gesegnet sei Seine Weisheit -- antworten
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment, @light and darkness, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
